data.title: Avenir Group has $857 million worth of Bitcoin ETF

data.title: Introducing Solayer (LAYER) on Binance BNSOL Super Stake — Earn LAYER Airdrop Rewards With BNSOL Holdings
data.description: Hold or stake BNSOL to share 1.6 million LAYER in APR Boost Airdrop Rewards from May 16 to July 16, 2025Binance is thrilled to announce the 8th project on its BNSOL Super Stake program: Solayer (LAYER) — a hardware-accelerated L1 blockchain designed to scale the Solana Virtual Machine (SVM) beyond 1 million transactions per second (TPS).Starting May 16, users can earn LAYER APR Boost Airdrop Rewards by simply holding or staking BNSOL through Binance or supported DeFi BNSOL assets in Binance Wallet.Campaign PeriodMay 16, 2025 – July 16, 2025 (UTC)Total Rewards: 1,600,000 LAYER Daily Rewards: ~25,806 LAYER per dayHow to Qualify for LAYER Airdrop RewardsYou can qualify in two ways:1. Binance ExchangeHold BNSOL in your Spot or Earn accountOr stake SOL into BNSOL via [Earn > SOL Staking]2. Binance Wallet (DeFi)Hold DeFi BNSOL Assets in a Keyless Binance Wallet:BNSOL Token: Token on SolscansBNSOL Token (Solayer BNSOL): Token on SolscanThese holdings will count toward your BNSOL Super Stake balance and qualify for boosted APR airdrops in LAYER tokens.LAYER Reward DistributionClaim daily starting May 17, 2025, at 05:30 UTCVisit [SOL Staking] and click [Claim Rewards]Unclaimed tokens will be airdropped to Spot Accounts after the campaign ends on July 17, 2025Boost Your Rewards With LAYER Earn ProductsYou can maximize your LAYER yield by subscribing your airdrop rewards to:LAYER Earn Locked: Up to 12.9% APR*LAYER Earn Flexible: Variable APR (check in-app for real-time rate)Navigate to [Earn] → [LAYER] → [Subscribe]How to Get BNSOLYou have three options:Go to [Earn] → [SOL Staking] → [Stake SOL]Stake SOL to BNSOL via Binance WalletBuy BNSOL on the Spot Market, Convert, Auto-Invest, or Buy Crypto pageWhat Is Solayer (LAYER)?Solayer is a next-gen L1 blockchain built to supercharge the Solana ecosystem, delivering hardware-accelerated throughput of over 1 million TPS, tailored for institutional-grade DeFi, NFTs, and gaming.

data.title: Binance Wallet TGE #17 Launches Alaya AI (AGT): Subscription Opens May 16
data.description: Users must use Binance Alpha Points to participate; 200M AGT reserved for future eventsBinance Wallet has officially announced the 17th Token Generation Event (TGE), featuring Alaya AI (AGT) — a cutting-edge AI protocol integrating decentralized intelligence and data ownership.TGE Details: Alaya AI (AGT)Project: Alaya AI ($AGT)TGE Round: #17Subscription Time: May 16, 20253:00 PM – 5:00 PM (UTC+8)Subscription Eligibility:Binance Alpha Points are now required to participateBonus Allocation: 200,000,000 AGT reserved for future events and campaigns (details TBA) The official TGE page and detailed event guidelines will be released soon — stay tuned on Binance Wallet channels.About Alaya AI (AGT)Alaya AI is a next-gen decentralized artificial intelligence platform that empowers users to own, monetize, and control their data. Built with scalability and user privacy in mind, Alaya aims to transform how data fuels AI across Web3.

data.title: PionIQ, an AI copyright creation and trading platform based on Solana, is officially launched
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: PionIQ, an AI copyright creation and trading platform built on Solana, announced its official launch. PionIQ takes "creation-rights confirmation-transaction-protection" as its core model to provide full-chain services for AI creators, and takes "creative freedom, transparent rights confirmation, intelligent transactions, and boundless protection" as its core, providing safe, efficient and open full-chain services for AI creators, copyright demanders and technology developers. The platform uses the immutability of blockchain and the automated execution characteristics of smart contracts to reshape the digital content creation and copyright ecology.

data.title: TradeFi asset trading platform UniMex opens seed round subscription
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News TradeFi asset trading platform UniMex announced that its seed round subscription will be officially launched at 00:00 (SGT) on May 26, and the platform governance token UNX will simultaneously start the first public subscription.
According to the official introduction, UniMex takes "TradeFi (tradable financial assets)" as the core, innovatively introduces the tradable asset mechanism of traditional finance into the crypto market, and is committed to building a new bridge connecting traditional finance and digital assets. The platform is vertically incubated by Web3 short video traffic platform UniLive, and has completed the data synchronization of 1.5 million registered users. It is expected to be officially launched in June 2025. $UNX holders can participate in core rights such as platform governance and handling fee sharing in the future.

data.title: Ukraine weighs adding Bitcoin to national reserves amid war and financial uncertainty
data.description:
15-5-2025 – Ukraine’s parliament is contemplating legislation that would establish Bitcoin as a component of its national reserves, though the proposal faces significant hurdles amid the nation’s ongoing conflict with Russia. The groundbreaking initiative, unveiled at Kyiv’s CRYPTO 2025 conference, follows in the wake of similar moves by other nations, including America’s recent policy shift [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ukraine-weighs-adding-bitcoin-to-national-reserves-amid-war-and-financial-uncertainty/

data.title: Pi Network invests $100M in startups building blockchain apps
data.description:
Mobile-first blockchain Pi Network has launched a $100 million fund to invest in initiatives built on its infrastructure. According to a May 14 announcement, the Pi Foundation is launching Pi Network Ventures with an initial investment of $100 million in Pi (PI) tokens and US dollars. The fund will invest in startups and businesses building on Pi Network or contributing to its broader ecosystem. “This strategic program intends to invest in high-quality startups and companies across sectors, driving innovation and ecosystem growth,” Pi Network said in an X post
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/pi-network-s-team-launches-100-m-fund-to-invest-in-ecosystem?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Al Abraaj Restaurants Group Adopts Bitcoin Financial Strategy
data.description: According to Foresight News, Al Abraaj Restaurants Group, a Middle Eastern company listed on the Bahrain Stock Exchange under the ticker ABRAAJ, has announced its decision to implement a Bitcoin financial strategy. This move marks a significant shift in the company's approach to financial management, reflecting a growing trend among businesses in the region to integrate cryptocurrency into their operations.

data.title: US President Trump: Trade discussed in talks on India-Pakistan dispute
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said that he had told India and Pakistan that they should resolve the dispute through trade rather than war, and both sides were satisfied with this. Trade issues were discussed in the talks on the dispute between India and Pakistan. (Jinshi)

data.title: SWIFT to Begin Digital Assets Integration in November 2025
data.description:
Digital assets are going to make a giant step forward. From November 2025, SWIFT will start live trials for using digital assets and currency transactions, transferring over $150 trillion yearly. This is a significant step toward making digital assets compatible with traditional finance worldwide
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/swift-to-begin-digital-assets-integration-in-november-2025/

data.title: Metamask Lead Dev Hints At Token: Best Crypto to Buy Now
data.description:
MetaMask, one of the oldest EVM wallet, trough its co-founder, Dan Finlay, hinted at the possibility of a native token, bringing excitement after years of stagnancy. After a good few years, some argue that MetaMask is getting slower, and many competitors, like Rabby and Best surface with innovations. Although this isn’t the first time MetaMask.

data.title: Abraaj Becomes First Public Company in the Middle East to Adopt Bitcoin Financial Strategy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Cointelegrah, Abraaj has become the first listed company in the Middle East to adopt a Bitcoin financial strategy. The Abraaj Group is a company operating on six continents. The company was founded by Pakistani businessman Arif Naqvi and is headquartered in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

data.title: SUN completed the 42nd token repurchase and destruction, with the cumulative destruction exceeding 500 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Sun.io officially completed the 42nd token repurchase and destruction from April 17 to May 15, 2025, destroying a total of 3,604,388.6187 SUN tokens, and the relevant tokens have been transferred to the black hole address. Data shows that since December 15, 2021 (Singapore time), a total of 502,577,256.07 SUN tokens have been repurchased and destroyed, of which 341,562,185.91 were destroyed through SunSwap V2 income and 161,015,070.16 were destroyed through SunPump income. This repurchase and destruction mechanism effectively increased the scarcity of SUN tokens and created long-term value for coin holders.

data.title: Telegram Pulls Plug on Haowang Guarantee Crypto Crime Syndicate
data.description:
Telegram banned thousands of accounts linked to the black market, formerly Huione Guarantee—but spin-offs are already filling the void.
source: https://decrypt.co/320178/telegram-pulls-plug-on-haowang-guarantee-crypto-crime-syndicate
